overall.description: Gameplay footage from a space simulation game showing first-person cockpit view of a spacecraft flying through a dense futuristic city at night. The player navigates between towering illuminated skyscrapers before panning to view the sprawling metropolis from a side window, with UI notifications appearing at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon between futuristic megastructures

agents.ego_description: piloting a spacecraft straight through narrow corridors between towering futuristic buildings with orange-lit HUD displays

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows forming the left wall of the canyon
massive futuristic building with detailed facade forming the right wall of the flight path
narrow corridor between buildings with distant city lights visible at the end
orange holographic display panels with radar, speed indicators, and NO TARGET text

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person cockpit view flying through a narrow urban canyon between massive futuristic skyscrapers at night. The orange-lit HUD displays flight information while the ship maintains a steady course between the towering structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between dense canyon and more open airspace

events.description: ship banks slightly left while maintaining forward momentum, left mega structure recedes into distance

agents.ego_description: navigating through the city with slight course corrections as the corridor opens up

entered.detail: patch of dark night sky becoming visible between the building tops
sprawling illuminated cityscape visible in the distance beyond the immediate corridor

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft continues through the city as the left mega structure passes behind and the right structure moves to mid-distance. The corridor opens slightly revealing patches of night sky and distant city lights while the ship maintains forward flight with gentle banking motions.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial panoramic view of the metropolis from side cockpit window

events.description: camera pans left from forward view to side window revealing the sprawling illuminated cityscape below
UI notifications appear for Covalex Link and Journal Entry Updated: Commodity Price Alerts

agents.ego_description: panning the camera to survey the vast cityscape from the side window while receiving system notifications

entered.detail: expansive view of the futuristic metropolis with countless illuminated buildings stretching to the horizon
text overlays displaying Covalex Link and Journal Entry Updated notifications

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of the sprawling futuristic city from the side window. The HUD remains visible while system notifications appear at the top of the screen, indicating communication links and journal updates as the ship continues flying past the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a spacecraft cockpit as it transitions from a claustrophobic urban canyon into a wide panoramic view of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor between massive, towering skyscrapers at night, with an orange-lit HUD providing flight data. As the ship maintains its course, the surrounding mega-structures begin to recede and the corridor opens up, revealing patches of the dark night sky and distant city lights through gentle banking motions. The camera then pans left to shift the focus from the forward path to the side window, unveiling a breathtaking expanse of the sprawling city. Finally, the view expands across the illuminated urban landscape as system notifications and journal updates appear at the top of the HUD.
